requirement_topic.en: TISI / TIS Battery Standards — IEC 62619:2022 and IEC 62133 Mapping

summary.en: Thailand's standards body is TISI. For BESS battery due diligence, exporters should check whether a Thai Industrial Standard, customer specification, tender document, or accepted test route references IEC 62619:2022 for industrial lithium cells and batteries or IEC 62133 for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries. Do not treat IEC 62619:2022 or IEC 62133 as a whole-BESS compulsory Thai market-access certificate unless the exact TISI compulsory list, import rule, or project instrument cites that scope.
summary.zh: 泰国标准机构为TISI。对于BESS电池尽调，出口商应核查泰国工业标准、客户规格书、招标文件或认可测试路径是否引用IEC 62619:2022（工业用锂电芯和电池）或IEC 62133（便携式密封二次锂电芯和电池）。除非具体TISI强制目录、进口规则或项目文件引用该范围，不应将IEC 62619:2022或IEC 62133视为整套BESS的泰国强制市场准入证书。
summary.zht: 泰國標準機構為TISI。對於BESS電池盡調，出口商應核查泰國工業標準、客戶規格書、招標文件或認可測試路徑是否引用IEC 62619:2022（工業用鋰電芯和電池）或IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯和電池）。除非具體TISI強制目錄、進口規則或項目文件引用該範圍，不應將IEC 62619:2022或IEC 62133視為整套BESS的泰國強制市場准入證書。

standards_or_laws: TISI Thai Industrial Standards catalogue and compulsory standards list

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024 for lithium-ion cells and batteries used in electric energy storage and GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium-ion batteries for electric energy storage. These GB documents can support technical comparison but do not prove Thai TISI/TIS applicability or Thai project acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024管理电力储能用锂离子电芯和电池，并采用GB/T 36276-2023作为电力储能用锂离子电池技术依据。这些GB文件可支持技术对照，但不能证明泰国TISI/TIS适用性或泰国项目接受。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024管理電力儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池，並採用GB/T 36276-2023作為電力儲能用鋰離子電池技術依據。這些GB文件可支持技術對照，但不能證明泰國TISI/TIS適用性或泰國項目接受。

gap.en: The gap is scope and recognition. A China GB report should be mapped clause-by-clause to the Thai project's TIS or IEC reference, cell chemistry, module configuration, BMS protections, thermal tests, labels, and Thai importer documentation. If a project asks for TISI/TIS evidence, confirm the exact TIS number and edition rather than substituting a Chinese GB report.
gap.zh: 差距在适用范围和认可。中国GB报告应逐条映射至泰国项目引用的TIS或IEC要求、电芯体系、模组配置、BMS保护、热测试、标签及泰国进口商文件。若项目要求TISI/TIS证据，应确认准确TIS编号和版本，而非以中国GB报告替代。
gap.zht: 差距在適用範圍和認可。中國GB報告應逐條映射至泰國項目引用的TIS或IEC要求、電芯體系、模組配置、BMS保護、熱測試、標籤及泰國進口商文件。若項目要求TISI/TIS證據，應確認準確TIS編號和版本，而非以中國GB報告替代。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where the exact battery product is covered by a Thai compulsory standard, import rule, tender, or project approval condition; otherwise IEC/TIS evidence may be voluntary or customer-required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market under GB 44240-2024; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended and commonly referenced

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not overclaim a blanket Thai whole-BESS TISI certificate. Confirm the exact TIS or IEC reference and whether it is compulsory, voluntary, or project-required for the shipped cell, module, rack, or integrated system.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应夸大为泰国整套BESS一律需要TISI证书。应确认实际出货的电芯、模组、电池架或集成系统对应的准确TIS或IEC引用，以及其属于强制、自愿还是项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應誇大為泰國整套BESS一律需要TISI證書。應確認實際出貨的電芯、模組、電池架或整合系統對應的準確TIS或IEC引用，以及其屬於強制、自願還是項目要求。
